nasb.text: The sons of Israel departed from there at that time, every man to his tribe and family, and each one of them went out from there to his inheritance.

esv.text: And the people of Israel departed from there at that time, every man to his tribe and family, and they went out from there every man to his inheritance.

cnv.text: 那時，以色列人離開那裡，各人回到自己的支派和自己的家族去；他們離開那裡，各人回到自己的地業去。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列人离开那里，各回自己的支派、宗族和家园。
